name: Lighter Box
description: All match win thresholds are +3 per copy owned.

name: Eager
description: At each match start one random die is pre-set to its max face — usable for sealing in round 1 without rolling.

name: Tab 9 Bounty
description: When tab 9 is sealed gain +1 HP per copy owned.

name: Bonus Seal
description: Sealing a tab also seals half its value (rounded down) if still open. E.g. sealing 8 seals 4; sealing 5 seals 2. No chain reactions.

name: Box Shutter
description: After a critical win the next match's win threshold is +5 per copy owned.
